---
title: "Team"
format: html
toc: false
---

:::::::::: grid-container
::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/AZ.jpeg" alt="Adrián Zancajo" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Adrián Zancajo (PI)**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/SG.jpeg" alt="Sheila González" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Sheila González**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/AJ.webp" alt="Andrea Jover" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Andrea Jover**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/AL.jpg" alt="Antonia Levantino" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Antonina Levantino**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/BLL.jpg" alt="Berta Llos" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Berta Llos**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/MM.webp" alt="Martí Manzano" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Martí Manzano**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/LLP.webp" alt="Lluís Pacerisa" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Lluís Pacerisa**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::


::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/MP.jpg" alt="Marcel Pagès" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Marcel Pagès**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/EQ.webp" alt="Edgar Quilabert" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Edgar Quilabert**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::

::: team-member
<img src="team_photos/AT.webp" alt="Andreu Termes" width="150" height="150"/>

<h4>**Andreu Termes**</h4>

<p><a href="https://uab.academia.edu/AdrianZancajo" target=" blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons academia size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=lg >}} </a>  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/AdrianZancajo" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;"> {{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=lg >}} </a></p>
:::


<style>
.grid-container {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 30px; /* Adjust gap for spacing between items */
    justify-items: center;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.team-member {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.team-member img {
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.team-member h3 {
    margin: 10px 0 5px 0; /* Adds some space between the image and name */
    text-align: center;
}

.team-member p {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 5px 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

p a {
    margin: 0 5px; /* Adds space between icons */
    text-align: center;
}
</style>
::::::::::
